items.name: Wolf Spider Left Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Join The Group For More Cool Items! ----> https://www.roblox.com/communities/10147459/Solitary-UGC#!/store

Add a creepy crawly companion to your avatar with the Wolf Spider Left Shoulder Pet.

Designed to sit naturally on the left shoulder with a realistic spider appearance.
